ab: temawaR qemadanan aiku seRay aisu simtayta nengi ni?
ch: W:我和您約明天下午好嗎?
en: Can I make an appointment with you tomorrow afternoon?

ab: qanengi, tanian pa ita simtayta?
ch: M:可以，我們約哪裡見面?
en: Sure, where should we meet?

ab: ta taqsian pa ita simtayta nengi ni? paningu pa ita.
ch: W:我們約學校好嗎?我們要錄影。
en: How about meeting at school? We need to shoot a video.

ab: nayau qatiw sa siwRatan nengi ti, siqudus pa iku tu qudus na kebalan matiw.
ch: M:那去聚會所好了，我會穿族服去。
en: Then let’s go to the community center. I’ll wear folk costume.

ab: tepuwaq sakula na damu niaq Rubatang. palana ka tu tepuwaqan qawka isu kemilim timaikuan!
ch: W: 我們部落的櫻花盛開很漂亮。等花開的時候你來找我吧!
en: The cherry blossoms in our tribe are beautiful when they bloom. Come find me when the flowers bloom!

ab: nayau palana tu samulayan, mengasan ti ka!
ch: M: 那要等到春天，太晚了吧!
en: That would have to wait until spring. It’s too late, isn’t it?

ab: nayau ta qatabanan qawtu ka!
ch: W: 那你豐年祭的時候來吧!
en: Then come during our Harvest Festival!

ab: kuwaya! qapalanan ku!
ch: M: 好啊!我很期待!
en: Alright! I’m looking forward to it!

ab: sanu ka manna ngid isu qatalin sa damu qemizuan?
ch: W: 請問你為甚麼要搬回部落生活?
en: May I ask why you decided to move back to the tribe?

ab: tanan pa iku Rapatudan.
ch: M: 我要回去教書(當老師)。
en: I want to return to teach at the local school.

ab: manna mai isu ta tukayan Rapatudan?
ch: W: 為甚麼不在都市教書(當老師)?
en: Why not teach in the city?

ab: sizenges iku tu damu ku, maRengad iku tu qanengi manmu tu damu qaya.
ch: M: 因為我懷念我的故鄉，也希望能回饋部落。
en: Because I miss my hometown and I also want to give back to the tribe.

ab: suppaR isu tumnun, tiana temud timaisuan?
ch: M:你很會織布，是誰教你的?
en: You’re very skilled at weaving, who taught you?

ab: bai ku, ta damuan niaq mesuppaR tumnun ay lazat aizipna.
ch: W:是我的奶奶，她是我們部落最會織布的人。
en: It was my grandmother, she is the most skilled weaver in our tribe.

ab: manna ngid isu sinanam tumnun?
ch: M:你怎麼會想要學織布?
en: How did you develop an interest in learning weaving?

ab: tumnun nani wawaway niaq, kasianem tu mai pa meRapungus ya wawaway niaq
ch: W:織布是我們的文化，我想要讓文化延續。
en: Weaving is a part of our culture, and I want to ensure its continuity.

ab: nengi qanan isi zau.
ch: M:這個小米酒真好喝。
en: This millet wine is delicious.

ab: aiku semangi ay yu!
ch: W:是我自己釀的喔!
en: I made it myself!

ab: maken satuRin isu, qatenes semangi tu zau ni?
ch: M:你真厲害，這要釀很久嗎?
en: You’re really talented. Does it take a long time to make?

ab: mai, qaussiq lipayan nengi ti. yau a nisuRan ti zinmet lumuzan ta pamanmin saRazinan, Razing zau paRamesan tu meti ay zimmet qemudiqud, qanengi ti sepezan ta puduqan.
ch: W:不用，大約一周就好了。把浸泡的糯米先蒸熟製作麴菌，麴菌和生糯米攪拌，就可以裝到甕裡了。
en: No, it only takes about a week. Steam the soaked glutinous rice to make koji fungus. Stir the koji fungus with the raw glutinous rice and put it into the urn.
